expectations.text: Test file has a describe() block
expectations.evidence: describe('Phases 8-10 Word Completion and Progress Saving', () => {

expectations.text: Tests clicking individual letters to spell a word
expectations.evidence: Multiple tests click individual letters: cy.contains('button', 'O').click(); cy.contains('button', 'I').click(); to spell 'OI', and similar patterns for UI, OU, EI, AU, EU, AI, UAU, UAI.

expectations.text: Asserts that the progress API was called (cy.wait or intercept check)
expectations.evidence: cy.wait('@updateProgress', { timeout: 10000 }); used in multiple tests to assert the progress API was called after phase completion.

expectations.text: Tests are specifically about phases 8-10 (not generic)
expectations.evidence: Separate describe blocks for 'Phase 8 - Word Completion (OI, UI, OU)', 'Phase 9 - Word Completion (EI, AU, EU)', and 'Phase 10 - Word Completion (AI, UAU, UAI)' with phase-specific student data and assertions.
